description: Enrich and embed Granola meeting notes on ingest

script.description: Auto-suggest tags based on summary content
script.source: def autoTags = []; def sumStr = ctx.containsKey('summary') && ctx.summary != null ? ctx.summary.toString().toLowerCase() : ''; def ktStr = ctx.containsKey('key_topics') && ctx.key_topics != null ? ctx.key_topics.toString().toLowerCase() : ''; def dmStr = ctx.containsKey('decisions_made') && ctx.decisions_made != null ? ctx.decisions_made.toString().toLowerCase() : ''; def s = sumStr + ' ' + ktStr + ' ' + dmStr; if (s.contains('demo') || s.contains('proof of concept') || s.contains('poc')) autoTags.add('demo-request'); if (s.contains('pricing') || s.contains('cost') || s.contains('budget') || s.contains('license') || (ctx.containsKey('budget_timeline') && ctx.budget_timeline != null && ctx.budget_timeline.containsKey('budget') && ctx.budget_timeline.budget != null)) autoTags.add('pricing'); if (s.contains('security') || s.contains('compliance') || s.contains('soc2') || s.contains('fedramp') || s.contains('hipaa') || s.contains('gdpr') || s.contains('pci')) autoTags.add('security'); def ce = (ctx.containsKey('competitive_landscape') && ctx.competitive_landscape != null && ctx.competitive_landscape.containsKey('competitors_evaluating')) ? ctx.competitive_landscape.competitors_evaluating : null; def hasCompetitors = false; if (ce != null && ce instanceof List) { hasCompetitors = ((List)ce).size() > 0; } if (s.contains('competitor') || s.contains('splunk') || s.contains('datadog') || s.contains('opensearch') || s.contains('sumo logic') || s.contains('new relic') || s.contains('dynatrace') || hasCompetitors) autoTags.add('competitive'); if (s.contains('deadline') || s.contains('timeline') || s.contains('by end of') || s.contains('go-live') || s.contains('renewal') || (ctx.containsKey('budget_timeline') && ctx.budget_timeline != null && ctx.budget_timeline.containsKey('timeline') && ctx.budget_timeline.timeline != null)) autoTags.add('timeline'); if (s.contains('blocker') || s.contains('escalat') || s.contains('urgent') || s.contains('critical')) autoTags.add('escalation'); if (s.contains('migration') || s.contains('migrate') || s.contains('cut-over') || s.contains('cutover')) autoTags.add('migration'); if (s.contains('architecture') || s.contains('design review') || s.contains('technical deep') || (ctx.containsKey('technical_environment') && ctx.technical_environment != null && ctx.technical_environment.containsKey('current_stack') && ctx.technical_environment.current_stack != null)) autoTags.add('technical'); if (ctx.containsKey('customer_sentiment') && ctx.customer_sentiment != null && ctx.customer_sentiment.containsKey('objections') && ctx.customer_sentiment.objections != null && ctx.customer_sentiment.objections.length() > 0) autoTags.add('has-objections'); if (ctx.commitments != null && ctx.commitments.size() > 0) autoTags.add('has-commitments'); if (ctx.containsKey('demo_poc_request') && ctx.demo_poc_request != null && ctx.demo_poc_request.containsKey('description') && ctx.demo_poc_request.description != null) autoTags.add('demo-request'); if (ctx.open_questions != null && ctx.open_questions.length() > 10) autoTags.add('has-open-questions'); if (ctx.containsKey('next_meeting') && ctx.next_meeting != null && ctx.next_meeting.containsKey('date') && ctx.next_meeting.date != null) autoTags.add('follow-up-scheduled'); if (ctx.tags == null) ctx.tags = []; for (t in autoTags) { if (!ctx.tags.contains(t)) ctx.tags.add(t); } ctx._auto_suggested_tags = autoTags;

script.description: Drop blank summary so ML inference skips (ignore_missing) and avoids NPE
Flag action items for downstream fan-out by rollup worker (ingest cannot index to other indices; rollup worker materialises action-items index)
script.source: if (ctx.action_items != null && ctx.action_items.size() > 0) { ctx._has_action_items = true; } else { ctx._has_action_items = false; }
